description: Dice, tokens, grid patterns, score displays, turn indicators for chess, checkers, and general board games.

board-grid.css: .board { display:grid; gap:0; border:4px solid #5c3d2e; border-radius:4px; box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .cell { width:64px; height:64px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:background 0.15s; cursor:pointer; } .cell:hover { filter:brightness(1.15); } .cell-light { background:#f0d9b5; } .cell-dark { background:#b58863; }
board-grid.usage: Apply .board to grid container, .cell-light/.cell-dark to alternating squares

tokens.css: .token { width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:700; font-size:18px; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .token-white { background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #f8f8f8, #d1d5db); color:#374151; } .token-black { background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #4b5563, #111827); color:#f9fafb; } .token-red { background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #ef4444, #991b1b); color:#fff; } .token-blue { background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #3b82f6, #1e40af); color:#fff; }

dice-renderer.description: Renders a die face (1-6) as SVG
dice-renderer.usage: renderDie(4) returns SVG for die showing 4
